title: Consistent Training Items [Cobblemon]
description: Changes the textures of the EV increasing items (feathers and vitamins) to have a consistent color with the Power items.
body:
# Consistent Training Items!
--------------------------------------------
Have you ever been playing on a Cobblemon server, and struggled to tell which vitamin is which? Have you ever noticed how inconsistent the feather coloration is, triggering your OCD? Well say no more! This extremely simple resource pack changes the textures of the EV training items (Feathers and Vitamins) to match their stats' respective Power item!

### **IMPORTANT: This pack has 3 different versions!** Version A, Version B, and Version C. You have to make sure to download the right version that matches your preference (1.1A is Version A, 1.1B is Version B, and 1.1C is Version C).

![versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24d11bab097fbf17f614a51ccae247ac03c97f7.png)

### **Version A (Matches the Power Item colors):**
- **Red for the Attack stat.**
- **Orange for the Defense stat.**
- **Yellow for the Sp. Defense stat.**
- **Green for the HP stat.**
- **Light Blue for the Speed stat.**
- **Magenta for the Sp. Attack stat.**
- **Blue for the PP Up.**

### **Version B (Matches the IV Candy colors):**
- **Red for the Attack stat.**
- **Blue for the Defense stat.**
- **Green for the Sp. Defense stat.**
- **Yellow for the HP stat.**
- **Light Blue for the Speed stat.**
- **Magenta for the Sp. Attack stat.**
- **Orange for the PP Up.**

### **Version C (Matches the Mint colors):**
- **Red for the Attack stat.**
- **Blue for the Defense stat.**
- **Pink for the Sp. Defense stat.**
- **White for the HP stat.**
- **Green for the Speed stat.**
- **Light Blue for the Sp. Attack stat.**
- **Orange for the PP Up.**
- **Black for the Fresh-Start Mochi.**

_(Note that this resource pack does NOT change the color of the Mint plants, Mint Leaves, or Mint Seeds... Those have their own color convention going on, and the color is in the name. I didn't want to change that, because then it would require having support for multiple languages which would be a pain)._

If you have any questions, need extra info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public [**Discord!**](https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg)
